title: RBI cancels Certificate of Registration of 135 NBFCs
description: The Reserve Bank of India, in exercise of powers conferred on it under Section 45-IA (6) of the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934, has cancelled the Certificate of Registration of the following companies. Sr. No. Name of the Company Registered Office Address CoR No. CoR Issued on Cancellation Order Date 1 Express Fincap House Private Limited Old UBI Building, 1st Floor, A T Road, Tinsukia 786125 B.08.00197 March 29, 2016 April 06, 2026 2 Akshay Fiscal Services Ltd 3, Mangoe Lane 2nd Floor, Kolkata
